title: support dot notation access to types defined inside interfaces
body:
The SystemVerilog 2017 LRM section _25.10 Access to interface objects_ explicitly defines access to types defined inside interfaces.

When trying to do this in Verilator I get:
```
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: ../../submodules/tcb/hdl/rtl/lib/tcb_lib_demultiplexer.sv:55:3: Unsupported: SystemVerilog 2005 typedef in this context
   55 |   typedef sub.rsp_t rsp_t;
```
But this is a generic error, not related to the described feature. I tried to corrupt the interface name and got the same error.

I can create a testcase for this feature, If you have an existing testcase for updating or copy-reference in mind please tell, otherwise I will try to find out myself in the following days.
